scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend/studiodesk" "npm run dev --prefix frontend/studiodesk-web"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend/studiodesk && npm run build --prefix frontend/studiodesk-web
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run start --prefix backend/studiodesk" "npm run start --prefix frontend/studiodesk-web"
